case_title: CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR (BDR) VS. CHRISTOPHER HICKS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2016: PLAINTIFF IS REPRESENTED BY K. DAVID DONAHUE, JR.--SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2016 BY JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERKS: L. FONG AND S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF THE TREASURER-TAX COLLECTOR (BDR) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HICKS, CHRISTOPHER $1,891.50 PRINCIPAL, $944.97 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,836.47
